name: lekiwi
author: dorarobotics
description: Drive a LeKiwi mobile base in simulation: move (forward/back/turn), stop, and read pose over the SPEC-VENDOR-NODE-V1 bridge.

tools.name: move_base
tools.description: Drive the mobile base for a fixed duration then stop. linear>0 forward, linear<0 back; angular>0 turn left, angular<0 turn right. 'move forward' -> linear=0.3, angular=0, seconds=2.

linear.description: forward/back speed m/s (+forward, -back); 0 to only turn

angular.description: turn rate rad/s (+left, -right); 0 to go straight

tools.name: get_base_pose
tools.description: Return the base's current pose {x, y, theta} in meters/radians.
